outputs.label: Index
outputs.formula: IF(hematocrit < 20 AND hematocrit >= 5, reticulocytes * (hematocrit / 45) / 2.5, IF(hematocrit >= 20 AND hematocrit < 40, reticulocytes * (hematocrit / 45) / 2, IF(hematocrit >= 30 AND hematocrit < 41, reticulocytes * (hematocrit / 45) / 1.5, IF(hematocrit >= 41 AND hematocrit <= 90, reticulocytes * (hematocrit / 45) / 1, 0))))
